name: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences Class A Ordinary Share
summary: Oaktree Acquisition Corp. III Life Sciences is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs do not have operations until an acquisition is completed. They raise capital through an initial public offering for the purpose of acquiring an existing company.
